auth.data_encrypted: Your data is encrypted and protected
auth.data_encrypted_reg: Your data is encrypted and protected under IT regulations
auth.login_error_official: This account is registered as an Official/Admin. Please use the Officer Portal to login.
auth.login_error_server: Unable to connect to government server. Please check your internet connection.
auth.login_error_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.reg_error_failed: Registration failed. Please check your details.
auth.google_failed: Google Authentication Failed. Please check your settings.
auth.reset_failed: Reset failed. Please verify your details.

branding.title: Citizen Grievance Portal
branding.empowering_text: Empowering citizens with transparent and secure services.
branding.register_hero_text: Register to raise and track your grievances securely.
branding.register_hero_sub: Join the unified government platform for seamless grievance redressal and transparent tracking.
branding.unified_platform: A unified platform for transparent governance, quick resolutions, and secure digital access.
branding.footer: © 2026 Ministry of Public Services • Digital India

branding.copyright: © 2026 • Government of India • Public Grievance Redressal System

dashboard.manage_grievances: Manage and track your official grievances through the secure portal.
dashboard.no_matching_desc: We couldn't find any records matching your search or filter criteria.

submit.title: File Official Grievance
submit.subtitle: Submit your issue directly to the concerned department. Your identity remains protected.
submit.form_title_placeholder: E.g. Broken water pipe in sector 4
submit.form_description_placeholder: Provide specific details about the issue...
submit.form_landmark_placeholder: e.g. Near Gandhi Park, Opp. Axis Bank
submit.form_landmark_desc: Helps the officer find the exact spot faster.
submit.ai_hint: Our AI will automatically route your grievance based on this description.
submit.error_location: Please pinpoint your location on the map to file a grievance.

success.title: Grievance Submitted!
success.desc: Your issue has been assigned to the relevant department based on its location and content.

landing.citizen_card_desc: Official channel for citizen complaints and monitoring
landing.officer_card_desc: Secure access for government department officers

track.title: Track Your Grievance
track.subtitle: Enter your complaint reference ID below
track.error_not_found: Could not find a grievance with this ID.
track.no_contact: Contact details not available for this department yet.
track.reopen_text: Not satisfied? Click here to reopen
track.reopen_confirm: Reopen this grievance for further review?
